creator: sakai@miya3f01.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp
text:
I want to contribute to FreeBSD project. And, I made a program for X.
Please try to use the program "XShodou" and 
add XShodou to package-collection.

I have sent XShodou to "ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/".
"xshodou-1.0.tgz" is the XShodou file.
Please unfreeze the file and read the README file.
If you have some questions, Please mail to me.
 
Sakai Hiroaki ( sakai@miya3f01.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp )
